div.p: Process Grid Mapping to Cluster Topology

g.text: 3D Process Grid: rank = dp × (PP × TP) + pp × TP + tp
TP All-Reduce | Every layer | batch x seq x hidden | NVLink (~300 GB/s)
PP Send/Recv | Every micro-batch | batch x seq x hidden | IB (~12 GB/s)
DP All-Reduce | Every step | model params | IB (~12 GB/s)
Key: TP requires NVLink within node, PP/DP tolerate inter-node
